ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sales data is recorded */,
  "weekly_sales" REAL /* Total weekly sales amount */,
  "holiday_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the week includes a holiday (1 for holiday, 0 for non-holiday) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the week */,
  "fuel_price" REAL /* Average fuel price during the week */,
  "cpi" REAL /* Consumer Price Index (CPI) for the week */,
  "unemployment" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the sales data */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the year */,
  "sales_type" TEXT /* Type of sales (e.g., online, offline, in-store) */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied during the week */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions during the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store manager */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or zone of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Opening date of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., federal, regional, cultural) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the holiday (e.g., one day, multiple days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the weather data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the day */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the day */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation during the day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the day */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., north, south, east, west) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "week_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "cpi" REAL /* Consumer Price Index (CPI) for the week */,
  "unemployment" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the week */,
  "fuel_price" REAL /* Average fuel price for the week */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the week */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales forecast record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_sales" REAL /* Predicted sales amount */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for forecasting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the inventory is recorded */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory record */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_hierarchy" TEXT /* Category hierarchy of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, regional director, corporate executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, marketing, finance) */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, executive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module or feature accessed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the promotion is held */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, bundle, free gift) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the campaign is held */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., email, social media, print) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the feedback is recorded */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., complaint, suggestion, compliment) */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_data" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the employee works */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "performance_ratings" REAL /* Performance ratings of the employee */,
  "training_history" TEXT /* Training and development history of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
